# Toolsify

> Free online calculators, converters, and utility tools. Fast, accurate, and no signup required.

Toolsify provides browser-based tools for math, finance, fitness, text, design, converters, and developers. Use this file to understand the site structure and preferred pages for indexing or AI-assisted answers.

## Main pages

- [Home](https://toolsify.online/)
- [All Tools](https://toolsify.online/tools)
- [Browse Categories](https://toolsify.online/tools/categories)
- [Contact](https://toolsify.online/contact)
- [Privacy Policy](https://toolsify.online/privacy-policy)

## Categories

- [Math & Calculators](https://toolsify.online/tools/math)
- [Finance](https://toolsify.online/tools/finance)
- [Fitness & Health](https://toolsify.online/tools/fitness)
- [Text Tools](https://toolsify.online/tools/text)
- [Design & Color](https://toolsify.online/tools/color)
- [Converters](https://toolsify.online/tools/converter)
- [Developer Tools](https://toolsify.online/tools/developer)

## Popular tools

- [BMI Calculator](https://toolsify.online/bmi-calculator)
- [Percentage Calculator](https://toolsify.online/percentage-calculator)
- [Word Counter](https://toolsify.online/word-counter)
- [EMI Calculator](https://toolsify.online/emi-calculator)
- [JSON Formatter](https://toolsify.online/json-formatter)
- [Color Converter](https://toolsify.online/color-converter)
- [Unit Converter](https://toolsify.online/unit-converter)
- [Markdown Editor](https://toolsify.online/markdown-editor)

## Optional

- [Sitemap](https://toolsify.online/sitemap.xml)
- [Robots](https://toolsify.online/robots.txt)
